type.description: One of: string, date, datetime, integer, decimal, boolean, uri, geojson_geometry, or concept:{ConceptId}

domain_override.description: Explicit domain namespace override. Set to null to force universal URI, or to a domain code (e.g. 'sp') to force domain-specific URI, regardless of which concepts use this property.

schema_org_equivalent.description: schema.org equivalent property as a CURIE (e.g. 'schema:givenName'). Used to generate camelCase aliases in the JSON-LD context.

sensitivity.description: How sensitive this property is in most deployment contexts. standard (default, can be omitted): no special handling. sensitive: reveals circumstances (health, poverty, victimhood) in most contexts. restricted: should not appear in credentials at routine service points.

category.description: Display grouping for this property (e.g. wash, housing, demographics, identification). Used by the site to render properties in sections.

immutable_after_status.description: Marks this property as a terms-field that must not change after the record reaches the named status. Emitted as ps:immutableAfterStatus in the RDF output. Adopter-enforced invariant; not validated by SHACL in v1. Currently only 'given' (for consent records) is supported.

age_applicability.description: Topical relevance tags indicating which age groups this property concerns. Not a filter primitive for eligibility: age-based filtering is computed from date_of_birth. Overlap between tags is intentional (e.g. a property may carry both child_5_17 and adolescent). Population guideline: only Person-scoped properties.

items.description: Age band. infant_0_1 (0-23 months), child_2_4 (2-4 years / 24-59 months), child_5_17 (5-17 years), adolescent (10-19 years per WHO; deliberately crosscutting), adult (18+ years).

valid_instruments.description: Instrument identifiers on which this property is validly populated when it appears on a Profile record (e.g. ['wg_ss', 'wg_es'] excludes CFM). Population guideline: only WG/CFM item properties and anthropometric item properties. Each value must be a code in the 'instrument-id' vocabulary. Enables a future data-level validator to reject a property populated on a Profile whose instrument_used is not in this list.

items.description: Instrument identifier referencing a code in the 'instrument-id' vocabulary. Current codes: wg_ss, wg_es, cfm_2_4, cfm_5_17, smart.

system_mappings.description: Mappings showing how external system values correspond to this property's values

external_equivalents.description: Mappings to equivalent classes or properties in external ontologies (e.g. SEMIC Core Vocabularies)

label.description: Human-readable name in the external ontology

uri.description: Full URI of the equivalent in the external ontology

match.description: Semantic match quality. SKOS-aligned: exact (same meaning), close (similar with minor differences), broad (external concept is broader than ours), narrow (external concept is narrower than ours), related (associated but not hierarchical). Non-SKOS extensions: name_match (same name but unverified semantics), none (no equivalent exists)

vocabulary.description: Which vocabulary or ontology module this comes from (e.g. 'Core Person', 'CCCEV')

note.description: Semantic rationale for the match quality, especially for close or broad matches

vocabulary_name.description: Name the external system uses for this field or vocabulary

unmapped_canonical.description: Canonical values not covered by this system

note.description: Context note about the overall mapping for this system

code.description: Identifier used in the external system

maps_to.description: Canonical property value, or null if no equivalent

unmapped_reason.description: Why this system value has no canonical equivalent. Required when maps_to is null.

note.description: Context note explaining the mapping rationale

migration_note.description: Note about planned changes to this mapping (e.g. when a deprecated code is removed)
